quiz.addQuizDescription: Create a new multi-lingual quiz assessment for your students.
quiz.quizDetailsDescription: Enter quiz information in English, Sinhala, and Tamil.
quiz.durationHint: Time limit for completing the quiz.

validation.durationMin: Duration must be at least 5 minutes.
validation.passingScoreRange: Passing score must be between 1 and 100.
validation.questionRequired: At least one question is required.
validation.choiceRequired: Each MCQ question needs at least 2 choices.
validation.correctRequired: Each MCQ question needs one correct answer.

timer.timedOut: Time is up! Submitting your answers...

student.myQuizzesDescription: View and take quizzes assigned to you.
student.noQuizzes: No quizzes are available right now. Check back later!
student.question: Question
student.submitConfirmDescription: Once submitted, you cannot change your answers.
student.submitConfirmUnanswered: You have {count} unanswered question(s). They will be marked incorrect.
student.tabSwitchWarning: Tab switch detected! Violation {count}/3. Leaving again may auto-submit your quiz.
student.tabSwitchLocked: Too many tab switches. Submitting your quiz...
student.timerPaused: Timer paused — return to this tab to continue.
student.betterLuck: You did not reach the passing score. Better luck next time!
student.timedOutMessage: Your time ran out before you submitted.
